State transition: assign FARMER 0 -> 1, assign WORKER 0 -> 2. Assignee must be active FARMER/WORKER; other roles return business error msg: 仅支持派给 FARMER/WORKER.
State transition: 1 -> 2 (pending_accept to accepted). Caller must be assigned FARMER; WORKER calling this endpoint returns business error msg: WORKER无需接单/拒单，请直接执行任务.
State transition: 1 -> 0 (pending_accept to pending_assign). Caller must be assigned FARMER; WORKER calling this endpoint returns business error msg: WORKER无需接单/拒单，请直接执行任务.
